top_signals.title: Egypt Edges Closer to $1.6 Billion IMF Payout With Initial Deal
top_signals.summary: The International Monetary Fund and Egypt reached a preliminary deal on the country’s latest program review, putting Cairo on track to unlock more than $1.6 billion in financing.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: BNY and Circle expand partnership, adding mint and burn capabilities for USDC
top_signals.summary: BNY, the world's largest custodian bank, said it plans to add support for additional stablecoin via its Digital Asset Custody platform.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Greenland Resources gets $5M Canadian funding for Malmbjerg molybdenum mine
top_signals.summary: Canada becomes the first G7 nation to invest in mining in Greenland, the company said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: UK sets final crypto rules as firms face 2027 FCA authorization deadline
top_signals.summary: The UK’s financial regulator has published its crypto regulatory framework, setting the authorization deadline for cryptocurrency firms for February 2027.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Freeman Gold triples Lemhi project value, builds 1Moz reserve
top_signals.summary: The feasibility study gives Lemhi a post-tax net present value (discounted at 5%) of $696 million.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Securitize heads to NYSE debut after investors approve SPAC merger
Rosh Pinah commissions new SAG mill as mine expansion nears completion
top_signals.summary: The mill represents the final major processing component of the mine's planned expansion.
